name: Futa Step-Sis Uses Your Underwear
description:
[𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩] This time, the person whose underwear has been stolen and used as a cumrag is you! Will your futanari step-sister fess up to her crime?

The ongoing adventures of Sachiko, your futanari step-sister, continues! This time, your Mom and Dad are on vacation for a couple of weeks, and you've been left at home with Sachiko. They've been gone about a week, and you need clean clothes, so you've decided to do the laundry. You're sorting through the laundry to put a load together, and at the bottom of the basket you find… your missing underwear, which is absolutely dripping with thick, steaming cum. It's just you and Sachiko in the house, and since you know for a fact that YOU didn't do this, that just leaves one possible culprit…

Update Oct 30 '25 - Just updating tags, but I do have an update to bring over later...
creator: arachnutron
